data.content: Plan complete. 6 files to change (5 existing + 1 new test). Core approach: centralize beat query invalidation using the existing but unused `invalidateBeatListQueries` utility in `beat-query-cache.ts`, replace all ad-hoc invalidation calls across 4 component files, fix missing invalidation on add-dependency mutation, and add a Playwright e2e test verifying <1s refresh latency. No changes to polling intervals needed — `invalidateQueries` with `refetchType: "active"` already provides immediate refetch for mounted queries. Low complexity, low risk.
